game_info.title: Cavern Tale
game_info.description:
**Cavern Tale** is a 2D action-platformer tribute to classic exploration games. You play as a lost robot scout who must navigate a treacherous subterranean cavern filled with hostile creatures.

Armed with your trusty Polar Star blaster, you must fight your way through bats and hopping critters. Defeated enemies drop golden energy crystals—collect them to level up your weapon, increasing its range and power. Be careful: taking damage not only hurts you but also drains your weapon energy!

Reach the blast door at the end of the cavern to escape. Watch out for spikes and pitfalls!
game_info.controls:
- **Arrow Keys**: Move Left/Right, Aim Up/Down
- **Space**: Jump
- **Z**: Shoot (Hold Arrow Up to shoot up)
- **Shift**: Sprint / Strafing (hold to lock facing direction while moving)
- **ENTER**: Start Game
- **ESC**: Pause Game
- **R**: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement, gravity, and basic jumping mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will hold the Right Arrow key to move the player and press Space periodically to simulate jumping. It checks if the player's X coordinate increases and Y coordinate changes (indicating jumping/falling).
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move from the spawn point to the right side of the screen without getting stuck in walls or falling through the floor.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement, gravity, and basic jumping mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy: The test controller will hold the Right Arrow key to move the player and press Space periodically to simulate jumping. It checks if the player's X coordinate increases and Y coordinate changes (indicating jumping/falling).
TEST_1.expected: The player should move from the spawn point to the right side of the screen without getting stuck in walls or falling through the floor.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify shooting mechanics and weapon leveling system.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will repeatedly press Z to fire the weapon while standing still. It will then simulate collecting experience points by artificially spawning them near the player.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Projectiles should spawn and travel. The weapon level should increase from 1 to 2 after "collecting" enough simulated XP.
TEST_2.description: Verify shooting mechanics and weapon leveling system.
TEST_2.strategy: The controller will repeatedly press Z to fire the weapon while standing still. It will then simulate collecting experience points by artificially spawning them near the player.
TEST_2.expected: Projectiles should spawn and travel. The weapon level should increase from 1 to 2 after "collecting" enough simulated XP.

TEST_3.test_description: Test enemy collision and damage handling.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller will move the player directly into an enemy. It monitors the player's health variable.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player health should decrease upon contact. Weapon XP should also decrease (damage penalty mechanic).
TEST_3.description: Test enemy collision and damage handling.
TEST_3.strategy: The controller will move the player directly into an enemy. It monitors the player's health variable.
TEST_3.expected: Player health should decrease upon contact. Weapon XP should also decrease (damage penalty mechanic).

TEST_4.test_description: Test death state and game over transition.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The controller will force the player to jump into a spike pit or take repeated damage until health is zero.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: GameState should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" when health reaches 0.
TEST_4.description: Test death state and game over transition.
TEST_4.strategy: The controller will force the player to jump into a spike pit or take repeated damage until health is zero.
TEST_4.expected: GameState should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" when health reaches 0.

TEST_5.strategy_description: The controller will teleport the player near the exit door and simulate the interaction/collision with the exit.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: GameState should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" upon touching the exit door.
